texto: You better keep your lane on this race of reaching out for our dreams and goals
autor: don't stand in the middle of the road because you will be run over by those who are determined to reach the finishing line.
explicacao: Citação de don't stand in the middle of the road because you will be run over by those who are determined to reach the finishing line. sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “You better keep your lane on this race of reaching out for our dreams and goals” articula motivacao, euginia-herlihy, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
